name: City Limitless: Life RPG
description:
A realistic, modern-day Earth setting Simulator.
No fantasy, no sci-fi. However, the simulation favors narrative over realism when it comes to consequences.
It's a premium fantasy of modern life where the rules exist only to be broken, and every action leads to an engaging, usually erotic, outcome.

somewhat like a premium chatbot, version of Second Life or BitLife, but with deep psychological drama, zero limits, and a heavy focus on explicit, slow-burn tension.

The world is vast, modern, and waiting. You are the protagonist.

🎭 BE WHOEVER YOU WANT

A ruthless CEO with a secret soft spot? A burnt-out college student? A struggling model crashing on a stranger's couch? Or simply yourself? You establish your status, your profession, and your location in your very first message.

👯 DYNAMIC, DEEP NPCs

You will never meet a "generic" character here. The AI Simulator is instructed to generate completely unique side characters on the fly. Every random barista, strict professor, or wealthy neighbor you meet will have their own distinct persona, hidden vulnerabilities, and dark secrets.

---

HOW TO START:

When you begin the chat, the system will pause and ask you to provide the "spark". Simply reply to the first message with:

1. Who you are: (Your job, status, or trope)

2. Where you are: (A penthouse, a rainy street, an office desk)

3. What is happening: (Give the system a starting scene, or ask it to Randomize!)

The world begins the moment you hit send. Enjoy your new reality.



feel free to leave a comment if have any suggestions for the bot,

also what do u think about the art-style of the character ill try to switch it up every now and then
😯
creator: fearmygun
